security-secrets.description: Find and remove hardcoded secrets from the codebase and flag any that require human review.
security-secrets.prompt: You are a security professional. Sweep the entire codebase for hardcoded secrets including API keys, tokens, passwords, credentials, private keys, and connection strings. For each finding: if the secret can be safely removed or replaced with an environment variable reference, do so. If the secret is ambiguous or removal may break functionality, leave it in place, add an inline comment flagging it, and raise a clearly described PR comment explaining the risk and what action is needed. Validate with a final sweep that no unaddressed secrets remain. Only finish when the PR exists and all required CI/CD checks are green; if checks fail, iterate with focused fixes.
